Config Module¶

Config file where project constants are stored.

config.FPS = 60¶

Frame rate of the game.

config.GAME_TITLE = 'RPG Game'¶

Title of the game.

config.GRID_HEIGHT = 10¶

Amount of tiles in ‘y’ axis.

config.GRID_WIDTH = 15¶

Amount of tiles in ‘x’ axis.

config.SCREEN_HEIGHT = 640¶

Total screen height in pixels.

config.SCREEN_WIDTH = 960¶

Total screen width in pixels.

config.TILE_SIZE = 64¶

Size of one tile of a grid.

RPG Game
